Services and support

We are an authorized service centre for Dell equipment repairs. Only with us can you repair your Dell laptop with the official manufacturer's warranty.

We have been successfully operating since 1992 and have earned a reputation as a reliable partner, as evidenced by our large number of regular clients. We take pride in being recommended and in turn , being advised to family and friends.

Read more

Repair of equipment from various brands
